subcodes.first_line: O God, Forgiver of sins, Dispeller of sorrows, and Concealer of faults! Verily, Thy lowly servant who is named Baqa [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا غافر الذنوب و کاشف الکروب و ستار العیوب ان عبدک الذلیل من سمی باقا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness
